best_artifact.title: Carlyle Q3 2025 Financial Results
relevant_snippets: TOTAL GLOBAL CREDIT CARRY FUNDS $ 38,835  n/a $ 27,419 $ 22,530 1.3x 11% 7% $ 266

• Fund management fees increased 9% in 3Q'25 from the comparable period in 2024, primarily driven by the activation of fees in certain Global Private Equity funds and the impact of fundraising in Carlyle
• FRE margin1 of 48% in Q3 2025 increased from 47% in Q3 2024. FRE margin was 48% YTD
in Q3 2025 was driven by a 6% increase in Carlyle AlpInvest AUM and a 3% increase in Global Credit AUM. Total Assets
• Inflows1 were $16.9 billion in Q3 2025, driven by our insurance solutions, U.S. and Europe structured credit, and asset-backed finance
